config.script:
function fopen() fopen=true end function
function fback() page_.result = CLng(0) 'ustaw zamknięcie jako Anuluj page_.goback() fback = true end function
function input_text_box(byval strTitle, byval strMessage, byval nOptions, byref strResult) page_text strTitle, strMessage , strResult if nOptions = EDIT_PASS then page_.ctrl(20).password = true end if input_text_box = page_.domodalauto() end function
function okclick() trans_.var(APPVAR_INPUTBOXTEXT) = page_.ctrl(20).text if page_.ctrl(20).text<>"" then page_.goback page_.result = CLng(1) end if end function
function cancelclick() page_.result = CLng(0) page_.goback end function
sub page_text(byval strNewTitle , byval strText , byref strResult) 'pobierz element strony odpowiedzialny za tytul 'i ustwa nowy naglowek strony dim pTitle set pTitle=page_.ctrl(ID_TITLE) pTitle.text=strText page_.topelement.title = strNewTitle page_.ctrl(20).text = strResult end sub
function c20_ongetdata(byref oCtrl): c20_ongetdata=true 'oCtrl.text=CStr(page_.root.nWiek) end function
function c20_ondataentered(byref oCtrl, byval newValue): c20_ondataentered=false 'strResult = newValue end function
